title: Welding Fixture Assembly
description: Designed precision welding fixture for automotive body panel assembly with GD&T compliance and manufacturing coordination.
objectives: Design high-precision welding fixture for chassis
requirements: Must integrate with robotic welding arm
solution: Developed a modular welding fixture using CATIA V5. Engineered custom locating pins and integrated pneumatic toggle clamps to ensure repeatable positioning. The structural frame was optimized using FEA to prevent thermal distortion during the welding process.
lessonsLearned: Optimized clamp sequencing saves 5s per cycle
